name: python3-tblib
title: python3-tblib
description:
Python 3 traceback fiddling library
This library allows pickling tracebacks so that they can be passed across
process boundaries.  The traceback objects that come out are stripped of
some attributes such as variables, but it is at least possible to raise
exceptions with those tracebacks or print them.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-tblib because Python 3 traceback fiddling library.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-tblib as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-tblib with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-tblib --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
